landing.tagline: Memorize Scripture the fun way with KJV memory verses — and pick up English along the way!
landing.feature1Desc: Build a daily habit of memorizing Scripture, one verse at a time — like the Shema, written on your heart.
landing.feature2Desc: Arrange word tiles or type it out yourself — memorizing feels like a game.
landing.feature3Desc: Memorize all 66 books of the KJV verse by verse, and your English improves naturally along the way.
landing.feature4Desc: You have up to 10 lives — miss a verse and you lose one, but they refill every 20 minutes. Practice daily to build your streak!

meta.landingTitle: PIX BIBLE — KJV Memory Verses · Memorize Scripture
meta.landingDesc: Memorize Scripture one tile at a time with KJV memory verses. PIX BIBLE is a retro-pixel Bible memory app — memorize the King James Version verse by verse with tile-ordering and typing drills.
meta.landingOgDesc: Memorize Scripture with KJV memory verses, one tile at a time. Topic and book memory courses included.
meta.coursesDesc: Browse KJV memory verse courses by topic and category — foundations, warm-up, Old Testament, New Testament, and topical courses.
meta.coursesOgTitle: KJV Memory Verse Courses | PIX BIBLE
meta.coursesOgDesc: Browse KJV memory verse courses by topic and category.
meta.courseDetailDesc: {title} — a course of {count} KJV memory verses. Memorize verse by verse and write the Word on your heart.
meta.courseDetailOgDesc: A course of {count} KJV memory verses.
meta.categoryDesc: KJV memory verse courses in the {label} category.
